en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: ’ita’ saboeh kayzaeh. kaysa’an yako ’am tomortoroe’ ’inimon nak’ino’ noka ka’alnoSaySiyat mayaka:i’ ka kasi’aelen.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的賽夏語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say SaySiyat for food.

ab: So’o ra:am ay kamatortoroe’ mayaka:i’ ka kano’?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: kamatortoroe’ yako haSa’. kayzaeh ay payaka:i’ naehan?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ya:o ’okay bazae’. kayzaeh ay paksobae:oh ka kapanabih.
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: kita’ ka hini! tani ma’an ka pinayaka:i’ panabih.
ch: A+:請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: A: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
A: It’s very well read.
Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.

ab: kamatortoroe’, ya:o mangowip ila maraS ka kaka:at.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: kamatortoroe’, ya:o mangowip ila maraS ka tati:iS.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: Sibae:aeh ka tati:iS kan niSo’ kapa’onhaelan.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.
B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: kaysa’an papayhini ila, pil’awan! rim’aen takakita’ naehan.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，明天再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
